response.overview: A group of people watches the sunset on a mountain while the camera struggles to adjust to the constantly changing light. The film is created using ink-jet direct-onto-film technique where the digital frame is printed directly onto recycled 16mm celluloid. Included are excerpts from "Appalachian Grove" by composer Laurie Spiegel.
response.tagline: As a group of people watch the sunset on a mountain, the camera struggles to adjust to the constantly changing light.
response.title: Flare
